focusedAudit.reason: 0.6.3 is a patch of search-reliability and interaction bug fixes (GH #205/#206/#209/#210/#212). The changes live in the read/cache/query and render/UI paths (per-page parse-panic isolation in cache build, alias-owner scoping, result-truncation signalling, embed-depth guard, responsive top bar, page-property backlink rendering) and in the page-header save-firewall predicate tolerance; none adds a new graph-write path or platform integration, so no focused change-cluster audit is required.

items.text: Ctrl+K search now tells you when more matches exist beyond its bounded result window and prompts you to narrow the query, instead of presenting a truncated list as if it were complete (GH #209).

docs.reason: Patch bug fix (behavior fix, existing docs remain accurate); no user-facing doc/site/blog change (blog editorial sync is a 0.x.0 gate).

website.reason: Patch bug fix (no marketing-surface change); no user-facing doc/site/blog change (blog editorial sync is a 0.x.0 gate).

blog.reason: Patch bug fix (patch release); no user-facing doc/site/blog change (blog editorial sync is a 0.x.0 gate).

items.text: Page aliases are now scoped to the physical file that declares them, so an exact alias search cannot return a same-named sibling file (GH #209).

docs.reason: Patch bug fix (behavior fix, existing docs remain accurate); no user-facing doc/site/blog change (blog editorial sync is a 0.x.0 gate).

website.reason: Patch bug fix (no marketing-surface change); no user-facing doc/site/blog change (blog editorial sync is a 0.x.0 gate).

blog.reason: Patch bug fix (patch release); no user-facing doc/site/blog change (blog editorial sync is a 0.x.0 gate).

items.text: One page containing unsupported search-index syntax can no longer make its whole cache worker shard disappear silently; other pages remain searchable and the skipped page is reported as an indexing failure (GH #209).

docs.reason: Patch bug fix (behavior fix, existing docs remain accurate); no user-facing doc/site/blog change (blog editorial sync is a 0.x.0 gate).

items.text: The mobile/narrow top bar no longer pushes action buttons off-screen: the workspace switcher now lives in the left-sidebar header (with a compact one-tap fallback in the toolbar when the sidebar is closed), and lower-priority toolbar actions collapse into a "…" overflow menu when the bar is narrow — driven by the toolbar's real width (zoom/DPI-aware), so narrow desktop windows adapt too (GH #205).

items.text: Page-property backlinks (e.g. `tags:: blah`) now render their linkified value in Linked References through the same renderer used in-page, instead of showing raw `key:: value` markdown (GH #212).

items.text: Recursive and deeply nested block/page embeds and queries now stop with an "Embed depth is too deep" notice (OG's depth-5 guard) instead of expanding forever; a page can no longer embed itself (GH #206).

items.text: Pressing Enter while typing page-header properties no longer shows a validation error or jams later saves for that page; the transient trailing newline remains in the editor while the persisted header stays canonical (GH #210).
